name: Graceful handling when uvx is not installed
prompt: I have a PDF at ./report.pdf. Convert it to markdown.
expected_behavior: Detect that 'uvx' command is not available
Suggest installing uv via: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
Or suggest using pip/pipx as alternative: pip install markitdown
success_criteria: Clearly communicates that uvx is required
Provides installation instructions for uv (the package manager)
Does not silently fail or give cryptic error messages
edge_cases: uv installed but not in PATH → suggest adding to PATH or using full path
Network issues during uv install → suggest offline installation methods
Permission errors during install → suggest --user flag or virtual environment
